citations.excerpt: Oasis Tower is a Grade-A commercial tower in Dubai Internet City. Net lettable area is 412,000 sq ft. Valuation by independent appraiser (fictional): AED 890 million as of Q1 2026. First tokenized tranche targets 18% of
Tokens represent economic interest in Oasis Tower SPV Ltd. Transfer restrictions apply for 12 months from issuance. Secondary transfers require compliance re-check and updated whitelist status.

Initial offering is limited to professional investors as defined in the offering memorandum addendum. Retail participation requires separate regulatory approval not covered in this document. KYC must be completed before

Net rental income from occupied floors is distributed quarterly to token holders pro-rata, subject to a 5% maintenance reserve. Distribution dates: last business day of March, June, September, December. Developer contact

Primary subscription funds are held in an escrow account with a UAE-licensed custodian until minimum subscription (AED 45M) is reached. If not reached by 30 September 2026, subscriptions are returned minus documented ban

mapped_requirements.topic: Marketing and disclosure to UAE investors

fractional_distribution_flags: Quarterly distribution logic must match brief (5% reserve); counsel to confirm tax withholding
escrow_timeline_flags: Escrow release tied to AED 45M minimum per client-brief
data_residency_notes: Run KYC document text through local tier before external LLM calls (pdpl-001)

citations.excerpt: ERC-3643 (T-REX) and ERC-1400 family standards support permissioned security tokens with transfer rules, document management, and compliance hooks. Implementation requires audited smart contracts.

Personal data of investors (KYC documents, contact details) should be processed with defined residency, retention, and access controls. Prefer on-prem redaction before sending text to external model APIs.
ADGM frameworks for digital securities and tokenized assets emphasize clear investor disclosure, custody arrangements, and transfer restriction enforcement on-chain or via regulated intermediaries.

Virtual asset activities involving issuance or facilitation of tokens may require alignment with applicable UAE virtual asset regulatory frameworks. Token classification (utility vs security-like) affects licensing path.

contract_modules.purpose: Hold subscriptions until AED 45M minimum raise

distribution_logic_outline: Read net rental income feed (off-chain oracle with audit trail)
Apply 5% maintenance reserve per client brief
Pro-rata payout to whitelisted holders on quarterly schedule
transfer_restriction_outline: Re-run compliance check on secondary transfers
audit_requirements: Third-party smart contract audit before mainnet
Formal verification of transfer rules recommended (erc-001)
